creator: patrick@spacesurfer.com
text:
If I start 2 X11 sessions (startx and start -- :1). The close the sessions on display :1, when I switch to the session on display :0 the system reboots. I have an amd64 with a ATI radeon card:

drm0: <ATI Radeon HD 4650> on vgapci0

Note that if I never close either X11 session there is no problem with stability (weeks uptime), however the only graphics intensive app I use is mplayer. mplayer is the only reason I need drm, however the bug will be triggered even if I havn't used mplayer in my X11 session.

I will attach the output from dmesg with my full system setup and the output from the two xorg log files.
